## Extension Submission

Thanks for submitting your extension to the Command Palette Extensions Gallery!
Please fill out the checklist below to help us review your PR quickly.

### Checklist

- [ ] My folder is named `<publisher>.<extension-id>` (lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphens only)
- [ ] I have added an `extension.json` with all required fields
- [ ] The `id` field in my `extension.json` matches my folder name
- [ ] I have added an icon file (PNG or SVG, under 100 KB)
- [ ] The `icon` field in `extension.json` matches my icon filename
- [ ] My extension is available at the install source I specified (winget/GitHub/Store)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)

### Additional context

<!-- Optional: Add any additional notes, context, or screenshots about your extension here. -->
